name_en: M12635 New Embossed! Victor Wallet. This compact Victor wallet is made from Monogram Shadow calfskin, embellished with delicate Monogram embossing patterns, exuding an air of 'understated luxury.' The interior offers practical organization with a zip pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flap features a snap closure and is embellished with the Louis Vuitton signature.
name_cn:
M12635 New Embossed! Victor Wallet. This compact Victor wallet is made from Monogram Shadow calfskin, embellished with delicate Monogram embossing patterns, exuding an air of 'understated luxury.' The interior offers practical organization with a zip pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flap features a snap closure and is embellished with the Louis Vuitton signature.
11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width).
